torch_pattern: act_groups = activations.view(N, H, W, groups, activation_channels // groups); res_groups = residuals.view(N, H, W, groups, residual_channels // groups); interleaved = torch.cat([act_groups, res_groups], dim=-1); interleaved = interleaved.permute(0, 1, 2, 3, 4).reshape(N, H, W, residual_channels + activation_channels)
applicability_notes: Grouped (interleaved) concat: ttnn.concat with groups>1 replaces the contiguous torch chain view->cat->reshape that interleaves activation and residual channel groups (NHWC, channels-last). Applies when fusing groupnorm-friendly skip-connection concats (e.g. UNet residual merge with grouped channels). Both inputs must match in all dims except last; both channel counts divisible by {GROUPS}.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: NHWC activation+residual channel-interleaved merge (UNet-style skip), dim=-1
placement_observations.source: golden _golden_function grouped_concat path; test variant: ttnn.concat(tt_concat_inputs, dim=dim, memory_config=output_memory_config) when input_mem_config is sharded, default interleaved otherwise
